title: Sustained GPU queue congestion — all partitions at capacity
summary: GPU partition has been at 100% utilisation since ~01:00 UTC. Standard partition at 94%. 35 jobs pending, longest wait 3.5 hours. Root cause: three long-running training jobs (>48h) are blocking the queue. No hardware fault detected.
notes: Expected to self-resolve when job 892001 (bob, 72h GPU job) finishes around 2026-02-12T01:00:00Z.
